titles.title: What Singing There Will Be up There

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: What singing there will be up there (2x) When face to face with Jesus We shall stand And join the heavenly choir in a better land.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: What singing there will be up there, What glory for the saints to share.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: O, glory, glory, glory, What singing there will up there.
